languages.text: "Оставьте старика. Пусть доживет последние годы в спокойствии".
"Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."
languages.original_text: "Оставьте старика. Пусть доживет последние годы в спокойствии".

traits.locale_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."
"Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."
"Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

languages.text: 「老人を放っておけ。彼に最後の年を平和に過ごさせろ」
languages.original_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

traits.locale_text: 「老人を放っておけ。彼に最後の年を平和に過ごさせろ。」

languages.text: "İhtiyarı rahat bırakın. Son yıllarını huzur içinde yaşasın."
languages.original_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

traits.locale_text: "İhtiyarı rahat bırakın. Son yıllarını huzur içinde yaşasın."

languages.text: «Dejen en paz al anciano. Que viva sus últimos años en paz».
languages.original_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

traits.locale_text: «Dejen en paz al anciano. Que viva sus últimos años en paz».

languages.text: “放过那老人。让他安然度过人生最后几年吧。”
languages.original_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

traits.locale_text: “放过那老人。让他安然度过人生最后几年吧。”

languages.text: « Laissez ce vieil homme tranquille. Il vivra ses dernières années en paix. »
languages.original_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

traits.locale_text: « Laissez ce vieil homme tranquille. Il vivra ses dernières années en paix. »

languages.text: "Lasst den alten Mann in Ruhe. Er soll seine letzten Jahre im Frieden verbringen."
languages.original_text: "Leave the old man alone. Let him live out his last years in peace."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst den alten Mann in Ruhe. Er soll seine letzten Jahre im Frieden verbringen."
